testcase.name: TC002_getbillBatchStatus
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"BatchStatus":{"Success":true,"Data":{"BatchId":"BAT012301203","BatchStatus":2,"Route":[],"BatchDate":{"BillPreparationDate":"2027-04-12","BillEditDate":"2027-04-12","BillPrintDate":"1900-01-01","BillPostDate":"1900-01-01","BillCreatedDate":"2027-04-12","BillModifiedDate":"2027-04-12","BillPeriodStartDate":"2017-04-17","BillPeriodEndDate":"2017-05-17","BillDate":"2017-05-17","ReadingDate":"2017-05-17","StatementDate":"1900-01-01","BTUDate":"2017-05-17"},"BatchDescription":"","BatchTotal":30.00000,"NumberOfTransactions":1,"CycleId":"","PrepUserId":"sa","EditListUserId":"sa","PrintUserId":"","PostUserId":"","CheckBookId":"","BillType":1,"LocationId":"SEWER002","PowerFactor":0.90000,"VersionNumber":0,"TransferCheckBatchId":""},"Messages":[]}}] but found [{"BatchStatus":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Invalid Batch Id BAT012301203","Level":3}]}}] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:656) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:666) at com.NexustAPIAutomation.java.CommonMethods.getMethod(CommonMethods.java:638) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:62) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:566) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:686) at testcase.name: delBatv4_EditListPrint
testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Response body doesn't match expectation. Expected: a string containing "{\"Billing\":{\"Success\":true,\"Data\":null,\"Messages\":[{\"Enabled\":1,\"Info\":\"Billing batch deleted.\",\"Level\":1}]}}" Actual: {"Billing":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Invalid Batch Id BAT012301203","Level":3}]}}
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance0(Native Method) at
